name: Mondo TV Iberoamerica, S.A.U.
summary: Mondo TV Iberoam√É¬©rica, S.A.U. produces and distributes audiovisual content in Spain, Portugal, Latin America, and the Spanish-speaking United States. The company produces TV series, films, fiction series, and news. It also distributes audiovisual contents of third parties. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Madrid, Spain.
